input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.1.2
            TITLE: the team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the shutdown circuit and

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.1.2: The team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the Shutdown Circuit and
IC.9.1.2 The team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the Shutdown Circuit and 
components at Technical Inspection

final_answer: rule IC.9.1.2: The team must be able to demonstrate all features and functions of the Shutdown Circuit and components at Technical Inspection
